title: Senior SEO Specialist at Swiggy Global Group

jsonLd.title: Senior SEO Specialist at Swiggy Global Group
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at Swiggy Global Group. We are on the lookout for a dedicated SEO Specialist to strengthen our Indore-based team.

About Swiggy Global Group:
Swiggy Global Group is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage marketplace relationships with Amazon, Flipkart, and Meesho
• Collaborate with logistics partners to ensure timely delivery
• Build and maintain affiliate and influencer marketing programs
• Manage product listings, pricing, and promotions on the platform
• Track key performance indicators including GMV, conversion rate, and ROI
• Create engaging content for product pages and social media
• Develop and implement category growth strategies

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Any graduate with relevant experience
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Data Analytics
• Proficiency in Digital Marketing
• Proficiency in CRM Software
• Proficiency in Customer Segmentation
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in Email Marketing
• Proficiency in Content Writing
• Proficiency in SEO/SEM

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Life and accident insurance
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Professional development and training programs
• Flexible working hours
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Indore, Madhya Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Swiggy Global Group!
